productDisplayName: Franco Leone Men Formal Black Formal Shoes
description: Cast a timeless impression with this pair of franco leone lace shoes. Give your formal wear a twist of fashion with this designer leather shoe and revel in the comfort of easy fashion.UpperLeather upper for absolute comfort and styleLace-up system for a snug, customised FitSuede inner lining on the forefoot region, and padded leather on the inner midfoot region for sweat-free all-day comfortMidsolePadded leather footbed ergonomically curved for all-day comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with textured geometrical lugs on the forefoot and heel for absolute grip on smooth surfacesCurved midfoot and raised heel for ergonomic comfort and styleshoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shineDo not store in direct sunlight
